title: U CAN GYM - 211info
text: EUGENE FAMILY YMCA U CAN GYM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates on referrals by physicians for individuals with physical mobility challenges to strengthen or condition themselves in a gym. Personal attendants may accompany the individual; some staff is available. A special weight room with equipment designed for wheelchairs is available. 600 E 24th Avenue Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 686-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 686-9622 Contact Name: Jenny Adams Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5:30am-9pm, Saturday-Sunday 7am-7pm Services: Disability Related Sports Therapeutic Exercise Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - LIVESTRONG AT THE YMCA HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - YMCA'S DIABETES PREVENTION PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMPS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE FAMILY YMCA
